response.global_analysis: 1. Dialogue Match: The English dialogue in the introduction and outro matches the characters' custom story prompts perfectly. 2. Song/Lyrics Match: The song 'Dragon Screamer' was transcribed in its original Japanese lyrics and synchronized with accurate English translations. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were aggressively timed to match vocal boundaries and fast rap portions, ensuring transitions are instantaneous and clear.

subtitles.original: As I, the keeper of the legendary weapon Nut Blade, will lend you its power.
subtitles.english: As I, the keeper of the legendary weapon Nut Blade, will lend you its power.

subtitles.original: Is this the voice of the Fire Blade Priestess?
subtitles.english: Is this the voice of the Fire Blade Priestess?

subtitles.original: Yes, you are right. I will lend you the power of this Nut Blade if you can prove yourself that you have the spirit to fight the pink giant monster.
subtitles.english: Yes, you are right. I will lend you the power of this Nut Blade if you can prove yourself that you have the spirit to fight the pink giant monster.

subtitles.original: Hah! Okay!
subtitles.english: Hah! Okay!

subtitles.original: Dragon One!
subtitles.english: Dragon One!

subtitles.original: Dragon One!
subtitles.english: Dragon One!

subtitles.original: 胸に刻めよ 時代のリーダー
subtitles.english: Carve it into your chest, leader of the era

subtitles.original: 見た目よりかは かなり Clever
subtitles.english: Rather cleverer than you look

subtitles.original: 渇いた心 荒むよりは
subtitles.english: Rather than letting your dry heart wither

subtitles.original: 時に泣いてみれば 見えてくる
subtitles.english: If you cry sometimes, you'll see

subtitles.original: 明日かけるのは 紛れもなく新しい自分
subtitles.english: The future you run toward is unmistakably your new self

subtitles.original: 誰かのためでもなく ただもっと上を目指せ
subtitles.english: Not for anyone else's sake, just aim even higher

subtitles.original: Dragon Screamer!
subtitles.english: Dragon Screamer!

subtitles.original: 昇る竜のようだ
subtitles.english: Like a rising dragon

subtitles.original: 金の光が 呼んだ未来が 導くんだ 僕らを
subtitles.english: The future called by the golden light will guide us

subtitles.original: Dragon Screamer! Dragon Fever! No Question!
subtitles.english: Dragon Screamer! Dragon Fever! No Question!

subtitles.original: Dragon One!
subtitles.english: Dragon One!

subtitles.original: 満ちているのに はるかなゴールは
subtitles.english: Even though it's within reach, the far-off goal

subtitles.original: 見た目よりかは かなりに Harder
subtitles.english: Is actually harder than it looks

subtitles.original: 君が踏み出す 勇気持てば
subtitles.english: If you have the courage to take a step forward

subtitles.original: やがて開く道が 目指すべき
subtitles.english: The path will eventually open up to where you should aim

subtitles.original: 場所選ぶのは 紛れもなく新しい自分
subtitles.english: Choosing the place is unmistakably your new self

subtitles.original: 翼を手にした君は どないな山も越える
subtitles.english: You, who have obtained wings, will cross any mountain

subtitles.original: Dragon Screamer!
subtitles.english: Dragon Screamer!

subtitles.original: 叫ぶ竜のようだ
subtitles.english: Like a screaming dragon

subtitles.original: 銀の嵐が 吹き飛ばすんだ 迷いとか 恐れを
subtitles.english: The silver storm will blow away your hesitation and fear

subtitles.original: Dragon Screamer! Dragon Fever! No Question!
subtitles.english: Dragon Screamer! Dragon Fever! No Question!

subtitles.original: Oh my way 走り出せ 駆け抜けるライバルという風
subtitles.english: Oh my way, start running! The wind called 'rivals' rushing past

subtitles.original: それなら conquest ハイペース 輝く未来未だ見ぬ明日
subtitles.english: In that case, conquer at a high pace, aim for the shining future and what is yet to be seen

subtitles.original: あきらめず探し続け ついに不変の夢 forever victory
subtitles.english: Never giving up, keep searching, finally, an unchanging dream forever victory

subtitles.original: 宙に浮かぶドラゴン 背に浴びる光 世界をその手に
subtitles.english: A dragon floating in the sky, light shining on its back, the world in your hands

subtitles.original: Dragon Screamer!
subtitles.english: Dragon Screamer!

subtitles.original: 昇る竜のようだ
subtitles.english: Like a rising dragon

subtitles.original: 金の光が 呼んだ未来が 導くんだ 僕らを
subtitles.english: The future called by the golden light will guide us

subtitles.english: Dragon Screamer! Dragon Fever! No Question!

subtitles.english: Dragon Screamer!

subtitles.english: Like a screaming dragon

subtitles.original: 銀の嵐が 吹き飛ばすんだ 迷いとか 恐れを
subtitles.english: The silver storm will blow away your hesitation and fear

subtitles.original: Dragon Screamer! Dragon Fever! No Question!
subtitles.english: Dragon Screamer! Dragon Fever! No Question!

subtitles.original: Dragon Screamer! Dragon Fever! No Question!
subtitles.english: Dragon Screamer! Dragon Fever! No Question!

subtitles.original: You have proven me your spirit. I shall bestow upon you the Nut Blade.
subtitles.english: You have proven me your spirit. I shall bestow upon you the Nut Blade.

subtitles.original: Thank you. I shall use this weapon to defeat the monster.
subtitles.english: Thank you. I shall use this weapon to defeat the monster.

subtitles.original: Now I have the Nut Blade, I shall continue my journey to defeat the giant pink monster.
subtitles.english: Now I have the Nut Blade, I shall continue my journey to defeat the giant pink monster.

subtitles.original: If my hunch was right, I think...
subtitles.english: If my hunch was right, I think...
